tasks.title: Implement RentCast adapter — fetch_rent_estimate
acceptance_criteria: fetch_rent_estimate(address, api_key) returns Decimal monthly rent on valid API response
fetch_rent_estimate returns None on empty api_key without making HTTP call
fetch_rent_estimate returns None on HTTP 4xx/5xx
fetch_rent_estimate returns None on connection error
fetch_rent_estimate returns None on budget exceeded (≥100 calls/day)
Successful response cached with 7-day TTL
Output is Decimal rounded to 2 decimal places
Existing get_rent_estimate_for_listing remains untouched

tasks.title: Implement GreatSchools adapter — fetch_school_rating
acceptance_criteria: fetch_school_rating(zip_code, api_key) returns Decimal average rating on valid response
fetch_school_rating returns None on empty api_key without making HTTP call
fetch_school_rating returns None on HTTP failure
Successful response cached with 30-day TTL
Output is Decimal rounded to 1 decimal place
Empty school list returns None
Existing get_school_rating remains untouched

tasks.title: Implement Walk Score adapter — fetch_walk_score
acceptance_criteria: fetch_walk_score(address, api_key) returns dict with walk_score, transit_score, bike_score
transit_score and bike_score are None when not in response
fetch_walk_score returns None on empty api_key without making HTTP call
fetch_walk_score returns None on HTTP failure
Successful response cached with 30-day TTL

tasks.title: Update __init__.py, .env.example, and devcontainer.json
acceptance_criteria: __init__.py has updated docstring referencing all 3 new adapters
.env.example contains RENTCAST_API_KEY, GREATSCHOOLS_API_KEY, WALKSCORE_API_KEY placeholders
.devcontainer/devcontainer.json containerEnv includes all 3 new keys with empty string defaults

tasks.title: Write tests for RentCast adapter
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover: successful API response → Decimal
Tests cover: empty api_key → None, no HTTP call
Tests cover: HTTP 4xx/5xx → None
Tests cover: connection error → None
Tests cover: budget exceeded (counter ≥ 100) → None
Tests cover: cache hit returns cached without HTTP call
Tests cover: cache set with correct key and TTL
Tests cover: output precision (2 decimal places)

tasks.title: Write tests for GreatSchools adapter
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover: successful API response → Decimal average
Tests cover: empty api_key → None, no HTTP call
Tests cover: HTTP failure → None
Tests cover: cache hit returns cached without HTTP call
Tests cover: cache set with correct key and TTL
Tests cover: output precision (1 decimal place)
Tests cover: empty school list → None

tasks.title: Write tests for Walk Score adapter
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover: successful API response → dict with 3 keys
Tests cover: empty api_key → None, no HTTP call
Tests cover: HTTP failure → None
Tests cover: cache hit returns cached without HTTP call
Tests cover: cache set with correct key and TTL
Tests cover: transit_score and bike_score default to None when missing
